title: Advanced Cybersecurity & Custom Tech Consulting
headline: Design secure, privacy-first technology tailored to how you actually use it.
description: Custom cybersecurity and technology consulting for privacy, security, and performance, serving homeowners and small businesses in Ocala, Belleview, The Villages, and surrounding Florida communities.

sections.heading: Did You Know?
paragraph: Most off-the-shelf technology solutions prioritize convenience over security, often exposing unnecessary services or relying heavily on third-party cloud platforms.
Advanced environments such as homelabs, smart homes, or self-hosted services require deliberate design to avoid data leakage and access risks.
Well-designed custom systems can improve privacy, reliability, and performance while reducing long-term complexity.

sections.heading: What We Do
paragraph: We help individuals and small organizations design and implement secure, efficient technology systems that go beyond basic tech support.
items: Harden smart home platforms and limit unnecessary cloud exposure
Implement encrypted storage, backups, and private file sharing
Build and secure homelabs or self-hosted services
Configure privacy-focused software and automation tools
Develop custom applications or systems with security-first principles

sections.heading: How It Works
paragraph: We begin with a technical consultation to understand your goals, environment, and risk profile.
From there, we design a clear, maintainable solution using trusted tools and proven security practices.
You retain full control of your systems with documentation and long-term sustainability built in.
